figures.caption: Table 1. Performance comparison on D4RL datasets. Scores are normalized as (score − random)/(expert − random) and presented as mean ± standard deviation. Our results are averaged across 4 random seeds.

Fig. 2. Evolution of the learned Q-values and predictive uncertainty for encountered state–action pairs during training. For a given (s, a), uncertainty is quantified as the log standard deviation of next-state predictions over the model ensemble.
